title: Testament Artifact
description: Schema for testament artifacts — generative self-portrait outputs produced by the system's operational algorithms. Each artifact represents the system rendering its own density into experience through a specific modality.

id.description: Unique artifact identifier (uuid4 hex prefix, 12 chars)

modality.description: Output modality — the medium through which the system renders itself

format.description: File format of the produced artifact

source_module.description: Engine module whose computation generated this artifact

organ.description: Organ scope of this artifact, or null for system-wide artifacts

description.description: Brief description of what this artifact renders

path.description: Filesystem path where the artifact was written

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the artifact was produced

metadata.description: Additional metadata specific to the artifact type

palette_source.description: Which aesthetic profile governed the rendering

data_snapshot.description: Hash or identifier of the source data at render time

renderer.description: Renderer function that produced this artifact

spec_trace.description: Constitutional spec this artifact traces to
